history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young couple, a man and a woman, are lying in bed, embracing and kissing. They are nestled under a thick, fluffy white comforter and a brown blanket. The woman, with long, dark brown hair, is leaning over the man, her arms wrapped around his neck. She is wearing a black t-shirt with a subtle floral pattern. The man, with curly dark hair, is lying on his back, with a red heart-shaped pillow beneath his head. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the word "NEVER" visible on the sleeve.

The background shows a quilted, beige headboard on the left side of the frame. Behind the pillows, a stuffed brown dog toy is visible, perched on the edge of the bed. The room appears to be dimly lit, suggesting a cozy, intimate atmosphere, possibly nighttime or early morning. The overall color palette is warm and soft, dominated by the browns and whites of the blankets, the beige of the headboard, and the dark tones of the couple's hair and clothing. The mood is romantic, affectionate, and peaceful. The image is captured from a slightly high angle, looking down at the couple.
